lines: Curaçao got absolutely battered 0-2 by Côte d'Ivoire, meaning The Foreman now has a team with zero wins, zero points, and all the tournament relevance of a wet fart — and that's before we mention Türkiye haven't won a single game yet either, so today against the USA is basically a must-win for a side that looks like they fundamentally cannot win.

Morocco smashed Haiti 4-2 which is great news for Butters, Callum, Jim, and Wilmot — four cunts sharing one decent team like they're splitting a Greggs sausage roll, but hey, at least someone's eating.

Ellis is having a proper rough one — South Korea just got done 1-0 by South Africa, New Zealand are barely alive in Group G, and Paraguay are third in Group D, so today's fixture against Australia is essentially Ellis's entire tournament hanging by a thread.

Jim's Qatar are sitting on a single point after three games and just got smashed by Dene's Bosnia, which is almost impressive levels of uselessness — Jim, mate, you're paying entry fees to watch Qatar.

Today's big one: Al's Netherlands face Callum and Dene's Tunisia in Group F — Tunisia are pointless and desperate, Netherlands need a win to go top, so watch Al either coast into the knockouts or somehow bottle it against a side that has nothing to lose and absolutely nothing to show for it yet.
